question: The line chart shows revenue for various years. Which of the following statements is most appropriate based on the chart as drawn?

options.A: Revenue in 2021 appears to be limited by the top of the chart, so its exact value relative to other years is unclear.
options.B: Revenue increased by the same amount every year.
options.C: Revenue in 2019 and 2021 is clearly the same.

explanation: The bar tops are clipped outside the visible plotting area, so equality or ordering for the clipped bars cannot be inferred.
